title: Quantum Computing Stocks: Infleqtion Starts Trading As Public Company | Investor's Business Daily
why:
- Infleqtion, a quantum computing firm, began trading as a public company after completing a merger with Churchill Capital Corp X.
- Infleqtion trades under the ticker symbol INFQ.
- On its first day of trading, Infleqtion's stock price rose over 22% in early trading.
- Quantum computing stocks had under-performed in 2026 ahead of Infleqtion's market debut.
